post_rendered:
I think there are some fair concerns in Ad’s posts, but I also feel like a lot of the case ends up overstated or not as solid as it first appears.

The most important insight I've had about Ad today is how they went from active lurking to hyperposting... almost instantly. This isn't alignment-indicative on its own, but paired with earlier scumreads, this comes across as scummy. I imagine Ad thinking, "Shoot, I'm getting hung today; I need to fakeclaim." Then "Shoot, it's LyLo, I need to lock in now, especially because I'm in a horrible position from the last two days."

The stuff about Aidan's early posts being fluff, for example - yeah, there was some irrelevant content at the start, but that's true for half the game. It feels selective to call that out when so many others, including Ad themself, weren’t pushing serious content early either.

The TMI point also doesn't quite make sense. The idea that Aidan's townreads are “unfounded” so they must come from knowledge is a stretch, especially without providing specific evidence where he slips. If anything, his reads have been a bit hesitant, which doesn’t suggest ostentatious confidence.

Same with the Unicode's case - Ad summarizes it as just “he didn’t make a readlist,” but Aidan was trying to compare tone and style across games to develop meta reads, which is a legitimate strategy. Whether that’s accurate or not, it’s more than just a single bullet point, and oversimplifying it makes the argument feel less fair.

That said, I do think there are parts of Ad’s case that are worth noting. Aidan’s reads on Ad have been somewhat swingy, and the way he’s positioned himself - in the middle of major pushes or high wagons without applying pressure - is the kind of thing that can go unnoticed if you don’t look closely. So while I don’t think Ad’s case is fully consistent with the information in the thread, I wouldn’t clear Aidan off that alone either.

Overall, Ad's case has some valid points but is mostly incoherent and somewhat illogical. The tone and style aren't as sharp or polished as Ad's historical wolfcases, suggesting it may have been pieced together with any available information, allowing Ad to post faster first, gaining a tempo and putting Aidan on the defensive. This could explain why there are both strong and weak aspects to the case.

As for Aidan... He hasn't made a proper wolfcase yet. I don't think we should be voting or drawing conclusions until both sides have presented their cases and defended against each other's arguments.

I would like to see Aidan's wolfcase by 8/5/2025, 8:00 pm ET. Does this sound like a fair deadline?

post_rendered:
Aidan, I’ve spent time rereading your posts, and I want to lay out a few concerns. This isn’t a scumread yet, but I’m having increasing doubts.

Tone Shift & Impulsivity
Your Day 3 feels drastically different from Day 2. You previously came across as calm and thoughtful. But now…
aidan0626 wrote:
ok screw it
i hard claim tracker Vote: ad333

That doesn't feel like the Aidan I townread earlier. You’ve defended it by saying:
aidan0626 wrote:
there was like a 30 min gap between #655 and #656 lol

But 30 minutes doesn’t change the fact that your tone was emotionally charged. A calm town PR doesn’t usually say “screw it” in LyLo. That sounds like a burst of frustration, not careful planning. Even if the choice wasn’t literally impulsive, it read that way.

Contradictions & Walkbacks
There are moments where your logic seems self-defeating. For example:
aidan0626 wrote:
there does not exist a world where ad is town

But shortly after:
aidan0626 wrote:
ok wait my brain is fried... mxsail read through what ad said and tell me what you think

If Ad is lockscum, why are you suddenly reevaluating based on her posts? It feels like you're trying to play both sides — hard push, then hedge. This may be to my overaction to your impulsivity, but the absolute certainty you should have with a real PR claim doesn't match your behavior.

Volume ≠ Insight
You’ve leaned heavily on activity to justify your slot:
aidan0626 wrote:
ad has been slanking the whole game while i've been active

But Quantity ≠ Quality. I’d argue some of your recent activity has been more about volume than substance. Repeating that you’re townier because you’re “doing more” doesn’t hold if it lacks new insight. A helpful townie isn't one that clogs the thread.

Positioning vs Pressure
Throughout the game, you’ve landed on major wagons (Eric, Ad), but often without leading them or applying pressure.
aidan0626 wrote:
i would have been fine with either hang

This kind of comment makes me wonder: are you trying to avoid blame no matter who flips? I asked you for comment multiple times but kept getting this over and over again.

Convenient Reads
You cleared me D2. Then D3, you floated a conspiracy theory about me. Then you re-cleared me again.
aidan0626 wrote:
wait i forgot about mxsail pushing johann... actually that prob means they aren't paired

Your reads on me and others feel like they change to suit the moment. That's what scum does when they want a townie hung - change your reads to attack the easiest elimination.

About the Claims
You said:
aidan0626 wrote:
if i was scum, i would wait for any other pr to claim

But… why should we believe that? WIFOM cuts both ways. Mafia could go for a bold counterclaim to shut down discussion and make people hesitate, especially believable with your previous towncred - exactly what’s happening now.

---

Conclusion:
I’m not saying Aidan is definitely mafia - Ad is still scummier, we cannot just ignore them either. But Aidan's tone, timing, and shifting reads raise questions.
His case against Ad relies heavily on the assumption that he's obviously town and Ad is obviously not. You can't assume what your trying to prove. I understand that if Aidan is town, he may have trouble understanding this, but not everyone is a PR. We don't have mechanical confirmation of your claims.

That’s not how LyLo should work.

We need to question both claims, both narratives, and all assumptions. I’m still digesting everything, but Aidan — I’d appreciate if you gave a fully structured wolfcase on Ad, with specific quotes and mechanical logic, not just emotional appeals, and activity. I know this may sound hippocratic because of my Johann (now Blight) case, but I've learned from eric and won't judge purly off activity anymore.

We need to get this right.

I was sure Aidan was town day 2. At the moment, while Ad is still scummier, Aidan isn't out of the question anymore.

For all we currently know we are in Setup 1, 3, 4, or 6.
Caveat to all this: we are assuming that the wolves are smart. This may not be so.

Setup 1: 1 Town Jailkeeper, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
Setup 2: 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
Setup 3: 1 Town Tracker, 1 1-shot Bulletproof Townie, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
Setup 4: 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-shot Bulletproof Townie, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
Setup 5: 1 Town Cop, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
Setup 6: 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons


Assuming Setup 1, so ad333 is town and aidan is wolf:
For all the wolves know they could be in Setup 1, 3, 5, or 6.
If the wolves do not counterclaim:
If there are two pr's (50% of cases), it boils down to f3 and the vt knows the wolf pair. The wolves would be outed if they were paired. The vt, wolf, wolf would crossvote and then it would just be WIFOM. But pr's have 2/3 chance of randomly hitting wolf.
If there is one pr, we have 4 vt's. Pr has a 1/2 chance of randomly hitting wolf. If one townie votes the other its over, but this is mostly WIFOM and pairings again.

Now if the wolves counterclaim, what should they counterclaim? (assuming preplanned, so they would not know we are in Setup 1)
They would most likely try to claim something such that they are confirmed.
- If Setup 1, then they should claim bp so that no one counterclaims and we have pr, fake pr, vt, vt, wolf and there is a 1/3 chance of randomly hitting wolf (even less because "fake pr" is "confirmed"). Additionally town has no way of knowing that the bp is fake since no one can confirm there not being a roleblocker. If they don't claim bp, then we have a pr and pr counterclaim, with a 1/2 chance of randomly hitting wolf.
- If Setup 3, then any claim will get counterclaimed. They should not claim cop though since cop does not appear in any setup with tracker and bp. Then, it becomes pr, pr counterclaim, other pr (conf), vt, wolf. 1/2 chance of randomly hitting wolf, with other complicated WIFOM/pairing analysis.
- If Setup 5, then they should claim doctor. Similar to Setup 1.
- If Setup 6, then any claim will get counterclaimed. Similar to Setup 3, but this time they should not claim jk.

In conclusion the best strategy for wolves, assuming that we are in setup 1, is to claim bp. They would be quite well off if Setup 1, and would still be in an ok spot if the other setups. They would definitely claim bp after ad333 claiming jk.

Other setups coming soon.

ok so i only loosely followed lylo this game
bc i was just trying to see if i could feasibly extend teehee signups
and it turned out to be cinema
here are some thoughts

personally think jk is a pretty bold claim but ig it worked out in the end
idk if i woulda had the balls to claim that if i were ad tbh
it also served to draw attention away from the wolf partner
which while i dont think was the intention it was prob for the best lmao

mxsail's impulsiveness argument on aidan was complete nonsense lol
and should have been pretty much outing immediately
the fact that ad didnt call them out on it was also very telling xd
and made it pretty clear it was ad/mxsail team from the beginning
even if u dont pick up on that
there were several wallposts later that were entirely shade on aidan with very little valid justification
and it just concludes with a random "i still think ad is scummier tho" after listing all the reasons why ad isnt
its a completely contradictory worldview and it read to me as very jarring

i obv dont have context of previous days but it felt like towns reads were very accurate
but their mech spec completely drove them off a cliff
blights analysis was like going into 5 layers of wifom
when i was reading this i felt like i was watching town of salem not forum mafia
nostalgia is crazy tho that was like.. 8 years ago or something that i last played that game

i also i think unicode got unfairly wolfread off of some pretty dubious activity angleshooting
volume reads in newbie games are a staple but theyre not very accurate lol
i honestly thought they were pretty towny the whole time

overall i think mxsail did a good job at making town discussion unreadable
between the wallposts and the iioa and the realtime back and forth over insignificant things
it kinda derailed discussion while adding to their volume
in a playerlist where people seem to be reading off volume fsr
i think this is what carried the mafia win more than anything this game

post_rendered:
lol.

sorry about inactivity.

@scb i claimed jk because i was pretty convinced it was a unicode!cop world but things worked out

best newbie game since 227, change my mind

Feedback^tm

1. NDMath++
dont get n1ed noob

2. ad333+
ur really polarized lol

3. scannose+
dont get n2ed noob

4a. JohannIsBach
you played relatively well, i think. obviously the weeklong post droughts are an issue, but i think most of the flaws in your gameplay can be rectified by just gaining more experience. come back and play again tbh

4b. balllightning37
your process was very good in lylo, and you got the deeper wolf in mxsail nailed. i think something that can help you in that scenario would be interactions, because once you understand mxsail is a wolf, if you read his interactions with ad and aidan you can pretty easily see which of them is his partner.

5. CoolBroCubby
you kinda just got flattened d1 because nd wolfread you and there’s not much you can do once he does that. you played very towny (i thought, i was spoiled though), however its always going to be hard to argue against a player as good as nd. as far as improving, i would suggest being more assertive and showing your work. even if it is stupid, like “i think he’s mafia because he used a non-default shade of red for coloring some words, which shows a wolfy self-awareness”, it is important for other town players to get a glimpse of your thought process so that they can determine if it is legit. the more work you show, the more work wolves have to fake to catch up. i was the d1 hang in my newbie game. this is not the end for you.

6. Unicode_Master03B8
idk what mafia experience you have prior to this but it definitely shows. you played well for being a pr, i think something that can help you more is being more confident in that CC situation in lylo. you were very laid-back, and almost tentative about the cc, while mxsail jumped all over the chance to call you a wolf. recognizing that mxsail is an outed wolf from your pov, appropriately matching his energy pushing you, and trying to use the extra information you have to solve the ad/aidan dome might be what your play looks like at the next level.

7. mxsail
wow. its rare that we have this competent of a wolf newbie. you played this SPECTACULARLY given the pl. you recognized the town was prioritizing quantity over quality in posts, so you made lots of posts, and saved your em dash-filled walls for wolfchat. i am also very impressed by your bp claim in f5, i was telling duke that i hoped you’d do that but i didnt think you actually would. as far as improving in the future goes, while you had lots of posts to get you cleared in this game, it probably wont cut it in a game full of more experienced players. work on specifically distancing with your partner, though atp this may be nitpicking.

8. Eric.s.lu
dont give up!! i understand not wanting a pr claim to die, and that is perfectly reasonable, but that doesnt mean you have to die instead. give other townies another option by starting a third wagon in that situation. you played well though.

9. aidan0626
in the lylo dome you were doing very well about solving in unicode/mxsail. however, i think it is important to realize that is your second priority. your first priority is convincing both other townies that ad is a wolf. if even one of them doesn’t believe you, its ggs. pull some quotes on ad, pull some quotes on yourself, leave them with no doubt you are town and ad is fake. only then should you find the second wolf in unicode/mxsail.
